plan_adherence_notes: The branch does not execute the plan. Relative to `ff/Tbayes-market-eu0-v2-execute-step-6`, the diff contains only `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-eu0-v2-execute-step-6-execute-step-3/{questions,research,plan}.json`. reason: The plan follows the research well, and the research is grounded in the current hook contracts, but this branch never implements the requested work.
